summary: The user is seeking recommendations for cat toys and scratching posts for their cat, Whiskers, who recently received a clean bill of health after an ear infection. The user is also interested in creating a cat agility course and addressing Whiskers' inconsistent litter box usage.
facts: The user recently got Whiskers a new scratching post that has been beneficial. Whiskers had a follow-up appointment about a month ago for an ear infection and received a clean bill of health. The user is looking for puzzle toys or interactive treat dispensers that are durable and easy to clean for Whiskers. The user plans to create a cat agility course in their living room using cardboard boxes and tunnels. The user is considering increasing the number of litter boxes in their home to encourage Whiskers to use them more regularly. The user is exploring online retailers like Chewy.com and Petco.com for cat supplies and toys. The user has heard positive feedback about CatLadyBox.com and is considering their subscription boxes. The user is looking for vertical scratching posts or pads specifically designed for cats who like to scratch.
